content:
# Growth Rate

**Summary**: The rate at which the hydrate crystal grows over time.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-habiburrahman|HABIBURRAHMAN, 2024]] measured growth rates to compare the effectiveness of different promoters.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-habiburrahman|HABIBURRAHMAN, 2024]] A key metric for determining how quickly a system can be sequestered.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-habiburrahman|HABIBURRAHMAN, 2024]] Time-series analysis of image data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- SDS achieved the highest growth rate (2.85 ± 0.36 mm/s) due to its ability to stabilize bubbles and increase interfacial area. ([[2024-habiburrahman|HABIBURRAHMAN, 2024, p. 145]])
